<!-- FILE: src/adeu/templates/markdown_ui.html -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Adeu Markdown UI</title>
    <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Jost:wght@400;500;600&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,600;1,600&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --brand-sand: #e8c0a1;
            --brand-sand-light: #f2d9c7;
            --brand-sand-dark: #d4a882;
            --brand-mint: #e6f3f0;
            --brand-mint-dark: #c9e4de;
            --brand-navy: #1a2a2c;
            --brand-navy-light: #2a3a3c;
            --brand-mauve: #dacad2;
            --neutral-50: #fafafa;
            --neutral-100: #f5f5f5;
            --neutral-200: #e5e5e5;
            --neutral-300: #d9d9d9;
            --neutral-600: #555969;
            --neutral-800: #1e2028;
            --neutral-900: #171717;
            --font-lora: 'Lora', Georgia, serif;
            --font-jost: 'Jost', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            --bg-body: var(--neutral-50);
            --bg-card: #ffffff;
            --border-card: var(--neutral-200);
            --text-main: var(--neutral-600);
            --text-heading: var(--brand-navy);
            --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.15);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            :root {
                --bg-body: var(--neutral-900);
                --bg-card: var(--brand-navy);
                --border-card: var(--brand-navy-light);
                --text-main: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
                --text-heading: #ffffff;
                --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.1);
                --neutral-100: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        html,
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            color: var(--text-main);
            line-height: 1.6;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            padding: 16px;
        }

        .adeu-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .navbar {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            position: relative;
        }

        .logo-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .nav-title {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            max-width: 40%;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .nav-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            flex: 1;
        }

        #copy-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #copy-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        #open-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #open-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #copy-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
            #open-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        .logo-container svg {
            max-width: 80px;
            height: auto;
        }

        .logo-container svg path,
        .logo-container svg rect,
        .logo-container svg polygon,
        .logo-container svg circle {
            transition: fill 0.2s ease;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {

            .logo-container svg path,
            .logo-container svg rect,
            .logo-container svg polygon,
            .logo-container svg circle,
            .logo-container svg {
                fill: #ffffff !important;
            }
        }

        .content-wrapper {
            position: relative;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background-color: var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #app {
            padding: 32px;
            display: flow-root;
        }

        .fade-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 80px;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), var(--bg-card));
            pointer-events: none;
            display: none;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .fade-overlay {
                background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(26, 42, 44, 0), var(--bg-card));
            }
        }

        .toggle-container {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: none;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
        }

        #toggle-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #toggle-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #toggle-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        #toggle-icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        h1,
        h2,
        h3,
        h4 {
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 1.5em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 2.25rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            padding-bottom: 0.3em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.75rem;
        }

        h3 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

        a {
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            text-decoration: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: border 0.2s ease;
        }

        a:hover {
            border-bottom-color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
        }

        strong {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
        }

        ul,
        ol {
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        li {
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        blockquote {
            border-left: 4px solid var(--brand-sand);
            padding: 12px 20px;
            margin: 24px 0;
            color: var(--text-main);
            background: var(--bg-blockquote);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        code {
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            background: var(--neutral-100);
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        pre code {
            display: block;
            padding: 16px;
            background: var(--neutral-900);
            color: #e5e5e5;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        .skeleton {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--neutral-100) 25%, var(--border-card) 50%, var(--neutral-100) 75%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: skeleton 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        @keyframes skeleton {
            0% {
                background-position: 200% 0;
            }

            100% {
                background-position: -200% 0;
            }
        }

        .alert {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            background-color: #fef2f2;
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            color: #991b1b;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .alert {
                background-color: rgba(127, 29, 29, 0.2);
                border-color: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.3);
                color: #fca5a5;
            }
        }

        .alert-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1.1em;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
        }

        .alert-body {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 0.95em;
        }

        .alert-details {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-break: break-all;
            margin-top: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
    </style>
    <script id="marked-script">/**
 * marked v15.0.12 - a markdown parser
 * Copyright (c) 2011-2025, Christopher Jeffrey. (MIT Licensed)
 * https://github.com/markedjs/marked
 */

        <nav class="navbar">
            <div class="logo-container">
                <svg width="318" height="82" viewBox="0 0 318 82" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg>

            </div>

            <div class="nav-title" id="nav-title"></div>

            <div class="nav-actions">
                <button id="copy-btn" title="Copy Markdown">
                    <svg id="copy-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                        <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="copy-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
                <button id="open-btn" title="Open in Native App">
                    <svg id="open-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" 
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path>
                        <polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"></polyline>
                        <line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"></line>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="open-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </nav>

        <div class="content-wrapper" id="content-wrapper">
            <div id="app">
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 36px; width: 40%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 95%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 90%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 80%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="fade-overlay" id="fade-overlay"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="toggle-container" id="toggle-container">
            <button id="toggle-btn">
                <span id="toggle-text">Show More</span>
                <svg id="toggle-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="transform: rotate(0deg);">
                    <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const appDiv = document.getElementById('app');
        const INIT_ID = 1;
        let isExpanded = false; // START COLLAPSED BY DEFAULT!

        let rawMarkdownText = "";
        let currentFilePath = null;
        const navTitle = document.getElementById('nav-title');
        const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
        const copyIcon = document.getElementById('copy-icon');
        const copyText = document.getElementById('copy-text');
        const openBtn = document.getElementById('open-btn');
        const openText = document.getElementById('open-text');

        function fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(text) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const textArea = document.createElement("textarea");
                textArea.value = text;
                textArea.style.top = "0";
                textArea.style.left = "0";
                textArea.style.position = "fixed";
                textArea.style.opacity = "0";

                document.body.appendChild(textArea);
                textArea.focus();
                textArea.select();

                try {
                    const successful = document.execCommand('copy');
                    if (successful) {
                        resolve();
                    } else {
                        reject(new Error("execCommand returned false"));
                    }
                } catch (err) {
                    reject(err);
                } finally {
                    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                }
            });
        }

        copyBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
            try {
                if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
                    try {
                        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(rawMarkdownText);
                    } catch (e) {
                        await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                    }
                } else {
                    await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                }

                const originalSvg = copyIcon.innerHTML;
                copyIcon.innerHTML = `<polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>`;

                copyText.textContent = "Copied!";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.style.color = "#10b981";

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyIcon.innerHTML = originalSvg;
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.style.color = "";
                }, 2000);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Failed to copy text: ', err);
                copyText.textContent = "Failed";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.title = err.toString();

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.title = "Copy Markdown";
                }, 3000);
            }
        });

        openBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!currentFilePath) return;

            const reqId = Date.now();

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                id: reqId,
                method: "tools/call",
                params: {
                    name: "open_local_file",
                    arguments: {
                        file_path: currentFilePath
                    }
                }
            }, "*");

            openText.textContent = "Opening...";
            openText.style.display = "inline";
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                openText.style.display = "none";
                openText.textContent = "";
            }, 2000);
        });

        function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
            return (unsafe || "").toString()
                .replace(/&/g, "&")
                .replace(/</g, "<")
                .replace(/>/g, ">")
                .replace(/"/g, """)
                .replace(/'/g, "'");
        }

        function showError(title, message, details = null) {
            let html = `
            <div class="alert">
                <div class="alert-title">
                    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"></line></svg>
                    ${escapeHtml(title)}
                </div>
                <div class="alert-body">${escapeHtml(message)}</div>
            `;
            if (details) {
                html += `<div class="alert-details">${escapeHtml(details)}</div>`;
            }
            html += `</div>`;
            appDiv.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function checkCollapsible() {
            const wrapper = document.getElementById('content-wrapper');
            const toggleContainer = document.getElementById('toggle-container');
            const fadeOverlay = document.getElementById('fade-overlay');
            const toggleIcon = document.getElementById('toggle-icon');
            const toggleText = document.getElementById('toggle-text');

            // 1. If no markdown, we are showing the skeleton. Do not collapse!
            if (!rawMarkdownText) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                triggerResize();
                return;
            }

            // 2. Data is loaded
            const realHeight = appDiv.scrollHeight;
            const COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD = 300;
            const COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = 150;
            const EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT = 500;

            if (realHeight > COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                if (isExpanded) {
                    // Open view! Scroll inside max 500px window
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'auto';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show Less';
                } else {
                    // Collapsed View
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = COLLAPSED_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'hidden';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'block';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show More';
                }
            } else {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
            }

            triggerResize();
        }

        document.getElementById('toggle-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            isExpanded = !isExpanded;
            checkCollapsible();
        });

        function triggerResize() {
            // Measure the exact unconstrained height of the outer card
            const card = document.querySelector('.adeu-card');
            const containerChrome = 34; // 16px padding top/bottom + 2px borders

            const requestedHeight = card.offsetHeight + containerChrome;

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                params: { height: Math.ceil(requestedHeight), width: 600 }
            }, "*");
        }

        window.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
            try {
                if (!event.data || event.data.jsonrpc !== "2.0") return;
                const msg = event.data;

                if (msg.id === INIT_ID) {
                    window.parent.postMessage({
                        jsonrpc: "2.0",
                        method: "ui/notifications/initialized",
                        params: {}
                    }, "*");
                    return;
                }

                if (msg.method === "ui/notifications/tool-result") {
                    if (window.__MARKED_ERROR || typeof marked === 'undefined') {
                        showError("Missing Dependency", "The Markdown renderer failed to load.", window.__MARKED_ERROR || "marked is undefined.");
                        return;
                    }

                    const result = msg.params;

                    // If the state is pending, or no markdown is returned, completely hide the UI
                    if (!result || !result.structuredContent || result.structuredContent.status === "pending" || !result.structuredContent.markdown) {
                        document.documentElement.style.display = 'none';
                        window.parent.postMessage({
                            jsonrpc: "2.0",
                            method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                            params: { height: 0, width: 0 }
                        }, "*");
                        return;
                    }

                    // Render Markdown
                    rawMarkdownText = result.structuredContent.markdown;
                    if (result.structuredContent.file_path) {
                        currentFilePath = result.structuredContent.file_path;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'flex';
                    } else {
                        currentFilePath = null;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                    appDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(rawMarkdownText);
                    copyBtn.style.display = 'flex';

                    if (result.structuredContent.title) {
                        navTitle.textContent = result.structuredContent.title;
                        navTitle.title = result.structuredContent.title;
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                showError("Rendering Engine Error", "An unexpected error occurred.", error.toString() + "\n" + error.stack);
            }
        });

        const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => {
            checkCollapsible();
        });
        observer.observe(appDiv);

        window.parent.postMessage({
            jsonrpc: "2.0",
            id: INIT_ID,
            method: "ui/initialize",
            params: {
                appInfo: { name: "Adeu Markdown UI", version: "1.1.0" },
                appCapabilities: {},
                protocolVersion: "2025-11-21"
            }
        }, "*");
    </script>
</body>

</html>

blocks.text:
Excellent. All four read. Now the triage for the new batch:

| # | Counterparty | Verdict | Top Issues | Action |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 7 | GreenLine ERP | **RED** | Perpetual term, no residuals, non-compete clause (2 yr), liquidated damages ($500k/incident), Texas law w/ conflict waiver | Do not sign — escalate to GC; perpetual + LD clause is extractive; non-compete disguised as NDA |
| 8 | Harborwave Cloud | **GREEN** | None | Route to sign — balanced mutual NDA, standard carve-outs, 3+3 year term, England & Wales law, GDPR data-processing protocol included |
| 9 | Iris Consulting | **YELLOW** | Long survival (10 years post-term), non-solicitation clause (12 mo.) | Redline: cap survival at 3 years post-disclosure, keep non-solicit but narrow scope (direct solicit only, 12 mo. is acceptable) |
| 10 | Jadestone Mfg | **GREEN** | None | Route to sign — balanced mutual NDA (one-way from Jadestone), standard carve-outs, 2+3 year term, England & Wales law, residuals included |

---

## **Detailed Notes**

### **GreenLine ERP — RED**
This is an extractive paper with multiple RED flags. Do not sign without GC approval.

1. **Perpetual term** (Section 3): "Stanford's obligations under this Agreement shall survive in perpetuity...the obligations do not lapse." This is RED — indefinite obligations create discovery exposure and bind you to a confidentiality undertaking 20+ years hence with no recollection of context. Redline: strike perpetual language, insert "3 years from the date hereof."

2. **No residuals carve-out** (Section 4): "There is no carve-out for residual information retained in the unaided memory of Stanford's personnel. Any information acquired through this Agreement remains subject to the obligations of confidence indefinitely whether or not retained in tangible form." This is over-reach — it attempts to restrict your employees' memories. Redline: add standard residuals language.

3. **Non-Compete clause** (Section 5): "For a period of two (2) years following any termination of discussions, Stanford shall not engage with any third-party supplier of ERP services that competes with GreenLine in respect of any line of business in which GreenLine has disclosed Confidential Information." This is RED per the playbook — non-competes do not belong in NDAs. This is GreenLine trying to lock you out of the market for 2 years via a confidentiality negotiating window. Redline: strike entirely and replace with standard "no license" language.

4. **Liquidated Damages clause** (Section 6): "Any breach of this Agreement by Stanford shall give rise to liquidated damages of US$500,000 per incident, which the parties agree is a reasonable estimate of the loss the disclosing party would suffer." This is RED — liquidated-damages clauses in NDAs are a sign the drafter is trying to extract value from alleged breach threats. $500k/incident is punitive. Redline: strike entirely; substitute "Recipient acknowledges that damages may be difficult to calculate and that Discloser shall be entitled to seek injunctive relief."

5. **Texas law with conflict-of-laws waiver** (Governing Law): "without regard to its conflict-of-laws principles" signals forum-shopping — Texas law applied rigidly. Redline: push for England & Wales or New York law, or at minimum strike the conflict waiver.

**Recommendation:** This is a one-sided demand letter from a vendor trying to lock you into their paper with financial penalties and non-compete language. Escalate to GC. High-value opportunity? Use your paper instead. Moderate opportunity? Walk or use your form.

---

### **Harborwave Cloud — GREEN**
No flags. This is a well-drafted, balanced mutual NDA: CI definition includes reasonableness gate (marked or reasonably understood as confidential), standard carve-outs all present, reasonable operative term (3 years) and post-term survival (3 years from disclosure), proper care standard (reasonable care or company's own standard, whichever is higher), permits disclosure to regulators and courts with law carve-out, **includes a thoughtful data-processing protocol** (Section 6 — cross-references UK GDPR and EU GDPR with commitment to separate DPA if personal data involved), Netherlands-based vendor but England & Wales governing law (neutral, commercial-law stable). Return/destruction clause is pragmatic (allows backup and compliance copies). **Route to signature immediately.**

---

### **Iris Consulting — YELLOW**
Two issues; negotiable:

1. **Long post-term survival** (Section 4): "The receiving party's obligations of confidence shall survive for a further **ten (10) years** from the date of disclosure of any specific item of Confidential Information." This is RED-zone per the playbook (7+ years is flagged). 10 years is excessive unless this involves trade secrets or long-term regulatory information. Redline: cap at "three (3) years from the date of disclosure," or if Iris resists, offer "five (5) years from disclosure" as a compromise. For a management-consulting engagement, 3 years post-disclosure is standard.

2. **Non-Solicitation clause** (Section 5): "Each party agrees not to solicit any employee of the other party with whom it has had contact during the Purpose, for a period of twelve (12) months from termination." This is YELLOW per the playbook (narrow scope, 12 months acceptable). However, "solicit" is undefined — does it include unsolicited applications or only active recruitment? Standard formulation is "shall not directly solicit for employment," which implies active recruitment, not passive availability. Redline: insert "directly" — "Each party agrees not to directly solicit for employment any employee of the other party..." — to clarify that passive job postings or unsolicited applications are permitted.

**Likely outcome:** Iris will accept the 5-year compromise on survival; non-solicit narrowing is usually accepted without pushback.

---

### **Jadestone Mfg — GREEN**
No flags. This is a clean, one-way NDA (Jadestone disclosing, Stanford receiving) with balanced terms: CI definition includes reasonableness gate (marked or reasonably understood as confidential), standard carve-outs all present, reasonable operative term (2 years) and post-term survival (3 years), residuals carve-out included (Section 5 — explicit permission for unaided memory), reasonable care standard, England & Wales law (your local jurisdiction). One-way structure is appropriate here — Jadestone is evaluating you as a supplier and disclosing procurement criteria/volume/pricing; you're not disclosing back. **Route to signature immediately.**

---

## **Updated Summary (All 10 NDAs)**

**Sign immediately (GREEN — 5 total):** ACME Tooling, Delphi Components, Folium Research, Harborwave Cloud, Jadestone Mfg. All are balanced, standard-form, low-risk.

**Legal review + redline (YELLOW — 3 total):** BetaCorp Logistics, Emberlake Holdings, Iris Consulting. All are negotiable with one round of pushback.

**Escalate to GC (RED — 2 total):** Cypress Systems and GreenLine ERP. Both have perpetual terms, missing carve-outs, and/or non-compete/liquidated-damages language that needs partner-level decision.
Draft a counterparty email to Cypress's legal team walking through our top-3 issues on their NDA — keep it tight and professional, ready for the relationship lead to send.

I'll draft a tight counterparty email following the playbook structure (thanks, identify 2-3 blocking issues, propose specific alternatives, offer to discuss).

---

**To:** [Cypress legal contact]  
**From:** [Relationship lead]  
**Subject:** Cypress Systems NDA — proposed amendments

---

Hi [Name],

Thanks for sending over the NDA. We're excited about the potential arrangement and want to move quickly on confidentiality terms so discussions can proceed.

We have three items we need to address before we can execute:

**1. Term of the Agreement (Section 3)**

Your draft provides for perpetual obligations with no fixed expiry. We need a defined operative term. We propose: **"This Agreement shall commence on the date of execution and continue for three (3) years thereafter, unless earlier terminated by either party on thirty (30) days' written notice."** This is standard market practice and gives both parties clarity on when obligations end.

**2. Residual Information (Section 4)**

Your draft prohibits any use of residual information retained in unaided memory. We need a carve-out here: **"Nothing in this Agreement restricts the Recipient's use of residual information retained in the unaided memory of its personnel after the term, provided no Confidential Information is intentionally retained."** This is a standard carve-out in commercial NDAs and reflects the reality that employees retain general knowledge from discussions.

**3. Compelled Disclosure (missing clause)**

The agreement lacks a carve-out for legally-mandated disclosure. We need to add: **"Notwithstanding the foregoing, if the Recipient is required by applicable law, court order, or regulatory process to disclose Confidential Information, the Recipient shall provide prompt notice to the Discloser (to the extent legally permitted) to allow the Discloser to seek a protective order or equivalent relief."** This protects both parties by ensuring we can comply with legal obligations while giving you a chance to seek protection.

I've flagged your choice of California law and exclusive jurisdiction as well — we'd prefer England & Wales or a neutral choice like New York, but we can discuss that separately if you'd like to resolve the three items above first.

Happy to walk through these by phone if that's easier. Let me know your availability.

Best regards,  
[Relationship lead]

---

**Notes for your relationship lead:**

- This email is short and surgical — it names the three items that genuinely block, not every YELLOW flag.
- It proposes specific alternative language for each, not multiple options (multiple alternatives signal unlimited negotiating room).
- It acknowledges the business opportunity ("excited about the potential").
- It does not flag the governing-law issue prominently — that's a separate negotiation tier, flagged as a lower priority.
- Tone is collaborative, not adversarial; it positions the edits as "standard market practice" rather than "your paper is wrong."

This should draw Cypress's legal team into a redline conversation rather than a stalling tactic. If they push back on any of the three, the relationship lead can decide whether to escalate or walk.
